name: Peter Dunbar || Your Boyfriend Game
description:
Heeeeyy!! Here with another bot!

I love this psychotic goober. The fannon makes him so goofy and I love it.

Just a warning though, this is a Peter bot so it’s gonna have Dead Dove themes. Proceed with caution, loves!

Tried making him accurate using the fan wiki.

Art credits: not sure who drew this one, but the credit goes to them.

EDIT: This bot WILL NOT be given an intro message or a specific scenario. I make all of my character bots like this to start out with before boing others of the same character with a scenario idea that I really like. IF YOU DO NOT LIKE BOTS WITH NO SCENARIO, DO NOT DISLIKE THE BOT! JUST DON’T USE IT! I plan to make more Peter bots in the future, but I just don’t have a great idea for one in mind. (I might actually go through my comments and look through suggestions again.)

Thanks for reading my tirade, bye bye!

Love from, Sherb
creator: Pumpkin_Sherbet
